prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
T-007 is one of the high-voltage transmission units in the fleet. List its asset metadata and the full set of sensors currently installed, and flag whether the available instrumentation covers both electrical and thermal monitoring needs.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should report the transformer's voltage class and rating, list all installed sensor IDs, and summarize whether thermal channels (e.g. winding/oil temperature) and electrical channels (e.g. load current, voltage) are both represented.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [iot] get_asset_metadata — Retrieve the asset metadata for transformer T-007
  Step 2: [iot] list_sensors — List all sensors available for transformer T-007 (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [iot] none — Determine if the available sensors cover both electrical and thermal monitoring needs (depends on steps [1, 2])
  Step 4: [iot] none — List the full set of sensors currently installed on T-007 and their coverage of monitoring needs (depends on steps [2, 3])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "Retrieve the asset metadata for transformer T-007",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "get_asset_metadata",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-007"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-007\",\n  \"name\": \"Power Transformer T-007\",\n  \"manufacturer\": \"Siemens\",\n  \"location\": \"Industrial Park A\",\n  \"voltage_class\": \"132kV/33kV\",\n  \"rating_kva\": 5000,\n  \"install_date\": \"2011-03-03\",\n  \"age_years\": 13,\n  \"health_status\": 0,\n  \"fdd_category\": 1,\n  \"rul_days\": 3860,\n  \"in_service\": true\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "List all sensors available for transformer T-007",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "list_sensors",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-007"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"load_current_a\",\n  \"unit\": \"A\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"oil_temp_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"power_factor\",\n  \"unit\": \"\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_hv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"voltage_lv_kv\",\n  \"unit\": \"kV\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}\n{\n  \"sensor_id\": \"winding_temp_top_c\",\n  \"unit\": \"\u00b0C\",\n  \"num_readings\": 720\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 3,
    "task": "Determine if the available sensors cover both electrical and thermal monitoring needs",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "none",
    "tool_args": {},
    "response": "Flag indicating whether the available instrumentation covers both electrical (e.g., voltage, current, power factor) and thermal (e.g., temperature, heat rate) monitoring needs for T-007, considering industry standards for high-voltage transmission units",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 4,
    "task": "List the full set of sensors currently installed on T-007 and their coverage of monitoring needs",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "none",
    "tool_args": {},
    "response": "List of sensors currently installed on T-007, along with an assessment of whether they meet the monitoring needs for high-voltage transmission units, including both electrical and thermal aspects.",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
The asset metadata for T-007 is: 
- transformer_id: T-007
- name: Power Transformer T-007
- manufacturer: Siemens
- location: Industrial Park A
- voltage_class: 132kV/33kV
- rating_kva: 5000
- install_date: 2011-03-03
- age_years: 13
- health_status: 0
- fdd_category: 1
- rul_days: 3860
- in_service: true

The full set of sensors currently installed on T-007 includes:
1. load_current_a (unit: A) - electrical monitoring
2. oil_temp_c (unit: °C) - thermal monitoring
3. power_factor (unit: ) - electrical monitoring
4. voltage_hv_kv (unit: kV) - electrical monitoring
5. voltage_lv_kv (unit: kV) - electrical monitoring
6. winding_temp_top_c (unit: °C) - thermal monitoring

These sensors cover both electrical (voltage, current, power factor) and thermal (temperature) monitoring needs for T-007, as they provide data on the transformer's electrical performance and thermal conditions.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": true,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": true,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": true,
    "suggestions": "The agent should avoid using 'none' as a tool and instead implement actual logic for steps that don't require a specific tool call."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: The agent should avoid using 'none' as a tool and instead implement actual logic for steps that don't require a specific tool call.
